title: Cattleya × zaslawskii
taxonomy: Cattleya × zaslawskii is a hybrid orchid that belongs to the genus Cattleya, which is part of the subtribe Cattleyinae within the orchid family (Orchidaceae). The subtribe Cattleyinae is further classified under the tribe Epidendreae. This classification is based on the orchid's flower and leaf morphology, as well as its genetic characteristics. Cattleya × zaslawskii is often grown for its unique flowers, which come in a range of colors. As a hybrid orchid, its classification may also be influenced by the specific parent species involved in its creation.
